### Do not change

set_source_files_properties(Constants.qml
    PROPERTIES
        QT_QML_SINGLETON_TYPE true
)



qt_add_library(QT_Calculator_App STATIC)
qt6_add_qml_module(QT_Calculator_App
    URI "QT_Calculator_App"
    VERSION 1.0
    RESOURCE_PREFIX "/qt/qml"
    QML_FILES
        "Constants.qml"
        "EventListModel.qml"
        "EventListSimulator.qml"
        SOURCES
        SOURCES calculatorlogic.h calculatorlogic.cpp
)
